hadiths.chapter: 124. CHAPTER ON A CHILD BEING BETWEEN BOTH
hadiths.ar:
4504  -  وَّ رَّوَّى عَّن ْذُّ إَّلل َّهِ ن ْن ُّ ج َّعْق َّزٍ إَّلْحِمْي َّزِى  ُّ عَّن ْ إ َّي  ُّوب َّ ن ْن ِ ن ُّوحٍ ق َّالَّ: كَّي َّث َّ إ ِلَّي ْهِ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ ن عْض ُّ  إ َّصْحَّان ِهِ إ َّن  َّهُّ 
كَّان َّث ْ لِى َّ إِمْزَّإ َّة   وَّ لِى  مِن ْهَّا وَّلَّذ  وَّ ج َّل َّي ْث ُّ سَّن ِي لَّهَّا ق َّكَّي َّث َّ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّم لْوَّلَّذِ إ ِلَّى إ َّن ْ ي َّن ْلُّغ َّ سَّن ْغَّ سِن ِي ن َّ إ ِلأ َّ 
إ َّن ْ ي َّس َّاءَّ إَّلْمَّزْإ َّة
hadiths.en:
Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub narrated from Abu Ayyub, from Al -Fudhayl ibn Yasar, 
from Abu Abdillah {a.s}, who said: "Any free woman who marries a slave and bears 
children from him, she has more right to her children than he does, and the children 
are free. However, if the man is emancipated, then he has more right to his children 
than she does because of his position as their father." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.435 • Al-Wafi, Vol.23 p.1377 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.21 
p.459 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 124, H. 4503

hadiths.chapter: 124. CHAPTER ON A CHILD BEING BETWEEN BOTH
hadiths.en:
Abdullah ibn Jafar al-Himyari narrated from Ayyub ibn Nuh, who said:  
One of his {a.s} companions wrote to him, saying: "I had a wife, and I have a child from 
her, but I divorced her." 
Imam {a.s} wrote in reply: "The mother has more right to the child until the child reaches 
seven years of age, unless the mother chooses otherwise."  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.435 • Al-Wafi, Vol.23 p.1376 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.21 
p.472

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 124, H. 4504

hadiths.chapter: 125. CHAPTER ON THE AGE AT WHICH CHILDREN
hadiths.ar:
4506 - وَّ رَّوَّى عَّن ْذُّ إَّلل َّهِ ن ْن ُّ ي َّحْي َّى إَّلْكَّاهِلِى  ُّ ق َّالَّ سَّا َّلَّ إ َّجْمَّذُّ ن ْن ُّ إَّلن  ُّعْمَّان ِ إ َّن َّا عَّن ْذِ إَّلل َّهِ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ : ق َّق َّالَّ لَّهُّ عِن ْذِى  
ج ُّوَّي ْزِي َّه   لَّي ْسَّ ن َّي ْن ِى  وَّ ن َّي ْن َّهَّا رَّجِم  وَّ لَّهَّا سِث  ُّ سِن ِي ن َّ ق َّال
hadiths.en:
Muhammad ibn Yahya al -Khazzaz narrated from Ghiyath ibn Ibrahim, from 
Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al -Sadiq {a.s} from his father, Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al -
Baqir {a.s}, who said:  
“Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib {a.s} said: "A woman touching her daughter in an inappropriate 
manner once she has reached six years of age is a form of indecency (a branch of 
fornication)." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.436 • Makarim Al-Akhlaq, Vol.1 p.223 • Al-Wafi, Vol.22 
p.849 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.20 p.230 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.101 p.96 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 125, H. 4505
reference.chapter: CHAPTER ON THE AGE AT WHICH CHILDREN
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON THE AGE AT WHICH CHILDREN

hadiths.chapter: 125. CHAPTER ON THE AGE AT WHICH CHILDREN
hadiths.en:
Abdullah ibn Yahya al -Kahili narrated that Ahmad ibn al -Numan asked Abu 
Abdillah {a.s}: "I have a young bondwoman who is not related to me by blood, and she is 
six years old." 
Imam {a.s} said: "Do not place her in your lap." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.436

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 125, H. 4506

hadiths.chapter: 125. CHAPTER ON THE AGE AT WHICH CHILDREN SHOULD NO LONGER BE TOUCHED AFFECTIONATELY OR
hadiths.ar: 4508 - وَّ رُّوِى إَّلصِّن ْي َّان ِ ق ِى  إَّلْمَّص َّاج ِغِ لِسِث ِّ سِن ِي ن
hadiths.en:
Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Abi Nasr narrated from Imam Ali ibn Musa Ar -
Ridha {a.s}, who said: "A boy is instructed to perform prayer when he is seven years old, 
and a woman is not required to cover her hair in front of him until he reaches puberty." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol.3 p.436 • Al-Wafi, Vol.22 p.815 • Wasa’il Al -Shi’ah, Vol.20 
p.229 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.21 p.460 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 125, H. 4507
reference.chapter: CHAPTER ON THE AGE AT WHICH CHILDREN SHOULD NO LONGER BE TOUCHED AFFECTIONATELY OR

hadiths.chapter: 125. CHAPTER ON THE AGE AT WHICH CHILDREN SHOULD NO LONGER BE TOUCHED AFFECTIONATELY OR
hadiths.ar:
4509  -  وَّ رَّوَّى عَّن ْذُّ إَّلل َّهِ ن ْن ُّ مَّي ْمُّون ٍ عَّن ْ ج َّعْق َّزِ ن ْن ِ مُّحَّم َّذٍ عَّن ْ إ َّن ِي هِ عَّن ْ إ ن َّان ِهِ عَّ ق َّالَّ ق َّالَّ رَّسُّولُّ إَّلل َّهِ صَّل َّى إَّلل َّهُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ 
وَّ إ لِهِ  ق ِى  إَّلْمَّص َّاج ِغِ لِعَّس ْزِ سِن ِي ن
hadiths.en:
It is narrated: "Children should be separated in their sleeping arrangements 
at the age of six years." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.436 • Makarim Al-Akhlaq, Vol.1 p.223 • Al-Wafi, Vol.23 
p.1380 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.20 p.231 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.21 p.461 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.101 p.97 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 125, H. 4508

hadiths.chapter: 125. CHAPTER ON THE AGE AT WHICH CHILDREN SHOULD NO LONGER BE TOUCHED AFFECTIONATELY OR
hadiths.ar:
4510 - وَّ ق ِى  رِوَّإي َّه ِ مُّحَّم َّذِ ن ْن ِ إ َّجْمَّذَّ عَّن ِ إَّلْعُّن َّي ْذِى ِّ عَّن ْ ر َّكَّزِي  َّا إَّلْمُّو ْمِن ِ رَّق َّعَّه إ َّن  َّهُّ ق َّالَّ ق َّالَّ إ َّن ُّو عَّن ْذِ إَّلل َّهِ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ 
« :ج َّار َّ سَّن ْغَّ سِن ِي ن
hadiths.en:
Abdullah ibn Maymun narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq {a.s} 
from his father, Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al -Baqir {a.s}, from his forefathers (peace be 
upon them), who said: The Messenger of Allah {SWT} (peace and blessings be upon him 
and his family) said: "A boy and a boy, a boy and a girl, and a girl and a girl should be 
separated in their sleeping arrangements at the age of ten years."  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.436 • Makarim Al-Akhlaq, Vol.1 p.223 • Al-Wafi, Vol.23 
p.1380 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.20 p.231 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.21 p.460 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.101 p.96 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 125, H. 4509
reference.chapter: CHAPTER ON THE AGE AT WHICH CHILDREN SHOULD NO LONGER BE TOUCHED AFFECTIONATELY OR

hadiths.chapter: 125. CHAPTER ON THE AGE AT WHICH CHILDREN SHOULD NO LONGER BE TOUCHED AFFECTIONATELY OR
hadiths.en:
In a narration from Muhammad ibn Ahmad, from Al-Ubaydi, from Zakariya al-
Mu’min, who raised it to Abu Abdillah {a.s}, he said:  
"When a girl reaches six years of age, a boy should not kiss her, and a boy should not 
kiss a woman once he passes seven years of age." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol.3 p.437 • Al-Wafi, Vol.22 p.849 • Wasa’il Al -Shi’ah, Vol.20 
p.230 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.101 p.96

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 125, H. 4510

hadiths.chapter: 126. CHAPTER ON LEGAL MARITAL PROTECTION (IHSAN)
hadiths.ar:
4512 - : وَّ سُّن ِلَّ إَّلص َّاذِق ُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ عَّن ْ ق َّوْلِ إَّلل َّهِ عَّز  َّ وَّ ج َّل ۝ وَّ إَّلْمُّحْصَّن ٰاب ُّ مِن َّ إَّلن ِّسٰاءِ ۝   
ق َّال ۝ وَّ إَّلْمُّحْصَّن ٰاب ُّ مِن َّ إَّل َّذ ِي ن َّ إ ُّوي ُّوإ إَّلْكِي ٰاب َّ مِن ْ ق َّن ْلِكُّمْ ۝ ق َّالَّ  «
hadiths.en:
Al-Alaa narrated from Muhammad ibn Muslim, from Abu Jafar Imam 
Muhammad ibn Ali Al -Baqir {a.s}, who said: I asked Imam {a.s} whether a bondwoman 
provides legal protection (iḥṣan) for a free man. 
Imam {a.s} said: "A bondwoman does not provide legal protection for a free man, nor 
does a slave man provide legal protection for a free woman. However, a Christian man 
provides legal protection for a Jewish woman, and a Jewish man provides legal 
protection for a Christian woman." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol.3 p.437 • Al-Wafi, Vol.15 p.254 • Wasa’il Al -Shi’ah, Vol.28 
p.75 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 126, H. 4511
reference.chapter: CHAPTER ON LEGAL MARITAL PROTECTION (IHSAN)
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON LEGAL MARITAL PROTECTION (IHSAN)
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٢٦، ح ٤٥١١

hadiths.chapter: 126. CHAPTER ON LEGAL MARITAL PROTECTION (IHSAN)
hadiths.en:
Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al -Sadiq {a.s} was asked about the saying of Allah 
{SWT}, the Mighty and Majestic: "And [forbidden to you are] married women " (Surah An-
Nisa 4:24). 
Imam {a.s} said: "They are those who have husbands." 
I said: "And [lawful in marriage are] chaste women from among those who were given 
the Scripture before you" (Surah Al-Ma'idah, 5:5). 
Imam {a.s} said: "They are the chaste women." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol.3 p.437 • Al-Wafi, Vol.21 p.277 • Wasa’il Al -Shi’ah, Vol.28 
p.72 • Tafsir Al-Burhan, Vol.2 p.57 • Tafsir Nur Al-Thaqalayn, Vol.1 p.594 • Tafsir Kanz Al-Daqaiq, Vol.4 p.42

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 126, H. 4512

hadiths.chapter: 127. CHAPTER ON THE HUSBAND’S RIGHTS OVER HIS
hadiths.ar:
4514   -  و-  رَّوَّى إلْحَّسَّن ُّ ن ْن ُّ مَّحْن ُّوب ٍ عَّن ْ عَّن ْذِ إلل َّهِ ن ْن ِ سِن َّان ٍ عَّن ْ إ َّن ِى  عَّن ْذِ إلل َّهِ   عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ ق َّالَّ: لَّي ْسَّ لِلْمَّزْإ َّة ِ مَّغَّ 
ر َّوْج ِهَّا إ َّمْز  ق ِى  عِي ْق ٍ وَّ لَّأ صَّذَّق َّه ٍ وَّ لَّأ  ي َّذْن ِي زٍ وَّ لَّأ هِن َّه ٍ وَّ لَّأ ن َّذ ْرٍ ق ِى  مَّالِهَّا إ ِل َّأ ن ِا ِذ ْن ِ ر َّوْج ِهَّا إ ِل َّأ ق ِى  جَّح ٍّ إ َّوْ ر َّكَّاة ٍ إ َّوْ ن ِزِّ 
وَّإلِذَّي ْهَّا إ َّوْ صِلَّه ِ ق َّزَّإن َّي ِهَّا.
hadiths.en:
Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub narrated from Malik ibn Atiyyah, from Muhammad ibn 
Muslim, from Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al -Baqir {a.s}, who said: 
A woman came to the Messenger of Allah {SWT} (peace and blessings be upon him and 
his family) and said: “O Messenger of Allah {SWT}, what is the right of a husband over his 
wife?" 
Imam {a.s} said: "She must obey him and not disobey him. She must not give anything in 
charity from his house except with his permission, and she must not observe voluntary 
fasting except with his permission. She must not deny him herself, even if she is on the 
back of a camel. She must not leave her house without his permission. If she leaves 
without his permission, the angels of the heavens, the angels of the earth, the angels 
of wrath, and the angels of mercy will curse her until she returns to her house."  
She then asked: “O Messenger of Allah {SWT}, who has the greatest right over a man?" 
He {saws} said: “His parents." 
She asked: “And who has the greatest right over a woman?"  
He {saws} said: “Her husband." 
She then asked: “Do I have the same right over him as he has over me?"  
He {saws} replied: “No, not even one out of a hundred." 
She said: "By the One who sent you as a Prophet with truth, no man will ever have 
control over my neck!" 
[REFERENCES] Al-Kafi, Vol.5 p.506 • Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol.3 p.438 • Makarim Al -Akhlaq, Vol.1 
p.214 • Awali Al-La’ali, Vol.2 p.142 • Awali Al-La’ali, Vol.3 p.310 • Al-Wafi, Vol.22 p.773 • Tafsir Al-Safi, Vol.1 
p.258 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.20 p.157 • Tafsir Al-Burhan, Vol.1 p.475 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.100 p.248 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 127, H. 4513
reference.chapter: CHAPTER ON THE HUSBAND’S RIGHTS OVER HIS
reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON THE HUSBAND’S RIGHTS OVER HIS
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٢٧، ح ٤٥١٣

hadiths.chapter: 127. CHAPTER ON THE HUSBAND’S RIGHTS OVER HIS
hadiths.ar:
4515 - وَّ رَّوَّى إَّلْحَّسَّن ُّ ن ْن ُّ مَّحْن ُّوب ٍ عَّن ْ مَّالِك ِ ن ْن ِ عَّطِي  َّه َّ عَّن ْ سُّلَّي ْمَّان َّ ن ْن ِ ج َّالِذٍ عَّن ْ إ َّن ِى  عَّن ْذِ إَّلل َّهِ عَّلَّي ْ هِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ ق َّالَّ:  
«اساً ي َّسْح ُّذُّ ن َّعْص ُّهُّمْ لِن َّعْض ِ ق َّق َّال 
رَّسُّولُّ إَّلل َّهِ صَّل َّى إَّلل َّهُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ وَّ إ لِهِ  إ َّجَّذإً إ َّن ْ ي َّسْح ُّذَّ لِأ َّجَّذٍ لَّأ َّمَّزْب ُّ إَّلْمَّزْإ َّة َّ إ َّن ْ ي َّسْح ُّذَّ لِز َّوْج ِهَّا
hadiths.en:
Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub narrated from Abdullah ibn Sinan, from Imam Abu 
Abdillah {a.s}, who said: 
"A woman has no authority, alongside her husband, to emancipate (a slave), give 
charity, make a bequest, give a gift, or make a vow concerning her wealth without her 
husband's permission, except in matters of Hajj, Zakat, honoring her parents, or 
maintaining ties with her relatives." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.438 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 127, H. 4514

reference.location: Volume 3 › CHAPTER ON THE HUSBAND’S RIGHTS OVER HIS
reference.ar_citation: من لا يحضره الفقيه، باب ١٢٧، ح ٤٥١٤

hadiths.chapter: 127. CHAPTER ON THE HUSBAND’S RIGHTS OVER HIS
hadiths.ar:
4516   -  وَّ رَّوَّى مُّحَّم َّذُّ ن ْن ُّ إَّلْق ُّص َّي ْلِ عَّن ْ س ُّزَّي ْسٍ إَّلْوَّإن ِس ِى ِّ عَّن ْ ج َّان ِزٍ عَّن ْ إ َّن ِى  ج َّعْق َّزٍ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ ق َّال إَّلل َّهَّ عَّز  َّ وَّ 
ج َّل َّ كَّي َّث َّ عَّلَّى إَّلزِّج َّالِ إَّلْح ِهَّاذَّ وَّ عَّلَّى إَّلن ِّسَّاءِ إَّلْح ِهَّاذَّ ق َّح ِهَّاذُّ إَّلز َّج ُّلِ إ َّن ْ ي َّن ْذ ُّلَّ مَّ الَّهُّ وَّ ذَّمَّهُّ جَّي  َّى ي ُّق ْي َّلَّ ق ِى  سَّن ِي لِ إَّلل َّهِ 
عَّز  َّ وَّ ج َّل َّ وَّ ج ِهَّاذُّ إَّلْمَّزْإ َّة ِ إ َّن ْ ي َّصْن ِزَّ عَّلَّى مَّا ي َّزَّى مِن ْ إ َّذ َّى ر َّوْج ِهَّا وَّ ع َّي ْزَّي ِهِ
hadiths.en:
Al-Hasan ibn Mahbub narrated from Malik ibn Atiyyah, from Sulaiman ibn 
Khalid, from Abu Abdillah {a.s}, who said: 
"A group of people came to the Messenger of Allah {SWT} and said:  
‘O Messenger of Allah {SWT}, we have seen people prostrating to one another.'  
The Messenger of Allah {SWT}  said: 'If I were to command anyone to prostrate to another, 
I would have commanded the woman to prostrate to her husband.'"  
[REFERENCES] Al-Kafi, Vol.5 p.507 • Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol.3 p.438 • Makarim Al -Akhlaq, Vol.1 
p.215 • Al-Wafi, Vol.22 p.777 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.20 p.162 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 127, H. 4515

hadiths.chapter: 127. CHAPTER ON THE HUSBAND’S RIGHTS OVER HIS
hadiths.en:
Muhammad ibn al -Fudhayl narrated from Shurayh al -Wabishi, from Jabir, 
from Abu Jafar Imam Muhammad ibn Ali Al-Baqir {a.s}, who said: 
"Indeed, Allah {SWT}, the Mighty and Majestic, has ordained jihad upon men and jihad 
upon women. The jihad of a man is to spend his wealth and sacrifice his blood until he 
is killed in the way of Allah {SWT}, the Mighty and Majestic. And the jihad of a woman is 
to be patient with what she faces from the harm and jealousy of her husband."  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.439 • Makarim Al-Akhlaq, Vol.1 p.215 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, 
Vol.20 p.157 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 127, H. 4516

hadiths.chapter: 127. CHAPTER ON THE HUSBAND’S RIGHTS OVER HIS
hadiths.ar: 4518 - وَّ ق ِى  جَّذِي ث ٍ إ ج َّزَّ ق َّال
hadiths.en:
Imam {a.s} said: "Indeed, those who are saved from among the men are few, 
and from among the women, even fewer and fewer." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.439 • Makarim Al-Akhlaq, Vol.1 p.215 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, 
Vol.20 p.157 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 127, H. 4517

hadiths.chapter: 127. CHAPTER ON THE HUSBAND’S RIGHTS OVER HIS
hadiths.ar:
4519  -  وَّ رَّوَّى مُّحَّم َّذُّ ن ْن ُّ إَّلْق ُّص َّي ْلِ عَّن ْ سَّعْذِ ن ْن ِ عُّمَّزَّ إَّلْح َّلا َّب ِ ق َّالَّ ق َّالَّ إ َّن ُّو عَّن ْذِ إَّلل َّهِ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلا م
وَّ ر َّوْج ُّهَّا عَّلَّي ْهَّا سَّاج ِظ  ق ِى  جَّق ٍّ لَّمْ ي ُّق ْن َّلْ مِن ْهَّا صَّلاَّة   جَّي  َّى ي َّزْص َّى عَّن ْهَّا
hadiths.en:
And in another narration, Imam {a.s} said:  
"The jihad of a woman is being a good wife." 
[REFERENCES] Al-Kafi, Vol.5 p.9 • Al-Kafi, Vol.5 p.507 • Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.439 • Shihab Al-
Akhbar, Vol.1 p.28 • Makarim Al-Akhlaq, Vol.1 p.215 • Uyun Al-Hikam, Vol.1 p.223 • Al-Wafi, Vol.22 p.776 • 
Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.15 p.23 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.20 p.163 • Bihar Al-Anwar, Vol.97 p.7 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 127, H. 4518

hadiths.chapter: 127. CHAPTER ON THE HUSBAND’S RIGHTS OVER HIS
hadiths.ar: 4520   -  وَّ رَّوَّى إَّلس َّكُّون ِى  ُّ عَّن ْ ج َّعْق َّزِ ن ْن ِ مُّحَّم َّذٍ عَّن ْ إ َّن ِي هِ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّمُّ ق َّالَّ ق َّالَّ رَّسُّولُّ إَّلل َّهِ صَّل َّى إَّلل َّهُّ عَّلَّي ْهِ وَّ إ لِهِ :
hadiths.en:
Muhammad ibn al-Fudhayl narrated from Sa'd ibn Umar al -Jallab, who said: 
Abu Abdillah {a.s} said: 
"Any woman who spends the night while her husband is angry with her over a rightful 
matter, her prayer will not be accepted until he is pleased with her."  
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.439 • Makarim Al-Akhlaq, Vol.1 p.215 
﴿HADITH ﴾ 
«

hadiths.chapter: 127. CHAPTER ON THE HUSBAND’S RIGHTS OVER HIS
hadiths.ar:
4521  -  وَّ ق َّالَّ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّم ي َّطَّي  َّن َّث ْ لِع َّي ْزِ ر َّوْج ِهَّا لَّمْ ي ُّق ْن َّلْ مِن ْهَّا صَّلاَّة   جَّي  َّى ي َّع ْي َّسِلَّ مِن ْ طِي ن ِهَّا كَّع ُّسْلِهَّا 
مِن ْ ج َّن َّان َّي ِهَّا
hadiths.en:
Al-Sakuni narrated from Jafar ibn Muhammad, from his father {a.s}, who said:  
The Messenger of Allah {SWT} (peace and blessings be upon him and his family) said: 
"Any woman who leaves her house without her husband's permission has no right to 
maintenance until she returns." 
[REFERENCES] Al-Kafi, Vol.5 p.514 • Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol.3 p.439 • Makarim Al -Akhlaq, Vol.1 
p.215 • Al-Wafi, Vol.22 p.778 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.21 p.116 • Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.21 p.517 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 127, H. 4520

hadiths.chapter: 127. CHAPTER ON THE HUSBAND’S RIGHTS OVER HIS
hadiths.en:
Imam {a.s} said: 
"Any woman who applies perfume for someone other than her husband, her prayer 
will not be accepted until she washes off the perfume as she would wash after a state 
of major ritual impurity (janabah)." 
[REFERENCES] Man La Yahduruhu Al-Faqih, Vol.3 p.440 • Makarim Al-Akhlaq, Vol.1 p.215 
﴿HADITH ﴾

reference.citation: Man Lā Yaḥḍuruh al-Faqīh, Vol. 3, Ch. 127, H. 4521

hadiths.chapter: 127. CHAPTER ON THE HUSBAND’S RIGHTS OVER HIS
hadiths.ar:
4523  -  وَّ ق َّالَّ عَّلَّي ْهِ إَّلس َّلاَّم مَّن ْز ِلِ ر َّوْج ِهَّا إ َّوْ ن ِع َّي ْزِ إ ِذ ْن ِهِ لَّمْ ي َّز َّلْ ق ِى  لَّعْن َّه ِ إَّلل َّهِ 
إ ِلَّى إ َّن ْ ي َّزْج ِغَّ إ ِلَّى ن َّي ْي ِهَّا
hadiths.en:
Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq {a.s} said: 
"It is not appropriate for a woman to perfume her clothes with incense when she 
leaves her house." 
[REFERENCES] Al-Kafi, Vol. 5 p.519 • Man La Yahduruhu Al -Faqih, Vol. 3 p.440 • Al -Wafi, Vol. 22 p.814 • 
Wasa’il Al-Shi’ah, Vol.20 p.161 
﴿HADITH ﴾
